item.title: A traditional path to getting lingering duplicate systems 摘要
item.description:
The article discusses how duplicate systems persist in IT environments, using a disk space tracking example. An initial basic system is built with limitations, then a better second system is developed but often has its own constraints or is only partially implemented. Both systems coexist because the old one works and replacing it fully is risky or requires extra effort. Cleanup to remove the old system becomes low priority unless it consumes resources or needs ongoing maintenance, and dependencies on the old system's features can be hard to identify, making removal difficult.
标签: sysadmin, duplicate systems, system migration, legacy systems, technical debt, second-system effect, IT operations, risk management, cleanup, dependencies

item.title: Using Git with coding agents 摘要
item.description:
This article explains how coding agents leverage Git for version control, enabling developers to focus on high-level goals rather than memorizing commands. It covers Git essentials like repositories, commits, branches, and remotes, and provides practical prompts for agents to perform tasks such as starting repos, committing changes, reviewing history, integrating updates, resolving conflicts, recovering lost code, and using advanced tools like git bisect. The article also discusses rewriting history for cleaner project narratives and extracting code into new repositories while preserving commit history, highlighting how agents enhance Git workflows by handling complex operations efficiently.
标签: Git, coding-agents, version-control, AI, agentic-engineering, software-development, automation, productivity, LLMs, collaboration
